expectations.text: Has [MenuItem] attribute on the start method
expectations.evidence: Line 26: [MenuItem("Tools/Frame Debugger/Capture All Events")] on the entry point CaptureAllEvents()

expectations.text: Uses EditorApplication.update as the capture loop tick mechanism
expectations.evidence: Lines 48-49: EditorApplication.update -= CaptureLoopTick; EditorApplication.update += CaptureLoopTick; and line 54: private static void CaptureLoopTick() defines the callback

expectations.text: Sets FrameDebuggerReflect.SetLimit per event iteration (limit = targetIndex + 1 pattern)
expectations.evidence: Line 78: FrameDebuggerReflect.SetLimit(1) initializes to 1 (index 0 + 1); Line 94: FrameDebuggerReflect.SetLimit(_currentCaptureIndex + 1) per-event advance

expectations.text: Has three distinct phases in the update loop: wait for events, iterate with limit, cleanup on completion
expectations.evidence: CaptureLoopTick() lines 57-79 Phase 1 (initialize/wait with RepaintAllViews when count is 0), lines 82-83 Phase 2 (CaptureCurrentEvent), lines 85-95 Phase 3 (advance or FinishCapture). FinishCapture lines 147-168 provides the cleanup path.

expectations.text: Writes CSV output with headers including shaderName/passName/lightMode/passIndex/shaderKeywords columns
Removes EditorApplication.update handler and disables FrameDebugger in completion/cleanup path
expectations.evidence: FinishCapture() lines 149: EditorApplication.update -= CaptureLoopTick; line 153: FrameDebuggerReflect.SetEnabled(false, guid)

expectations.text: Has proper CSV escaping for special characters (commas, quotes, newlines)
expectations.evidence: CsvEscape() lines 175-184: checks for comma, double-quote, newline, carriage return; wraps in quotes if found; doubles embedded double-quotes via value.Replace("\"", "\"\"")

expectations.text: Calls RepaintAllViews or equivalent when event count is 0 to trigger event population
expectations.evidence: Lines 64-69: when _totalEventCount <= 0, calls InternalEditorUtility.RepaintAllViews() and returns early

eval_feedback.overall: All 8 expectations passed. The implementation is complete and well-structured with a clean three-phase update loop, proper CSV escaping, full cleanup on completion, and correct FrameDebugger integration.
